events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: George Michael was a leading figure in the music industry, known for his work with Wham! and as a solo artist.

angles.name: George Michael Tribute
angles.copy: George Michael would have been 63 today, we're celebrating his life and legacy with some of his biggest hits.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: Michael Jackson passed away 17 years ago, leaving behind a legacy of music and dance.

angles.name: Michael Jackson Remembered
angles.copy: It's been 17 years since the King of Pop passed away, we're looking back at his incredible career and impact on music.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer for The Beatles, is celebrating his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo Starr Birthday
angles.copy: Ringo Starr turns 86 today, we're celebrating with some of his biggest hits and most iconic drumming moments.

events.title: Brian May turns 74
events.blurb: Brian May, the legendary guitarist for Queen, is celebrating his 74th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Brian May turns 74 today, we're celebrating his incredible career with Queen and his iconic guitar riffs.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman for The Rolling Stones, is celebrating his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Mick Jagger turns 83 today, we're celebrating his incredible career with The Rolling Stones and his iconic stage presence.

events.title: MTV Launched 45 Years Ago
events.blurb: MTV launched 45 years ago, changing the music industry forever with its 24-hour music video format.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: MTV launched 45 years ago, revolutionizing the music industry with its 24-hour music video format, starting with the Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

events.title: Oasis Release Definitely Maybe 32 Years Ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago, which became a critical and commercial success.

angles.name: Oasis Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago, we're looking back at its impact on the music industry.

events.title: Woodstock Festival Took Place 57 Years Ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, featuring performances from Jimi Hendrix, The Who, and many more.

angles.name: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
angles.copy: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, we're looking back at its historic performances and impact on the music industry.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis' Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away 49 years ago, leaving behind a legacy of music and entertainment.

angles.name: Elvis Remembered
angles.copy: It's been 49 years since the King of Rock 'n' Roll passed away, we're looking back at his incredible career and impact on music.

events.title: Tupac Shakur Shot 30 Years Ago
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot 30 years ago in Las Vegas, his legacy continues to inspire and influence music today.

angles.name: Tupac Shakur Tribute
angles.copy: Tupac Shakur was shot 30 years ago, we're celebrating his life and legacy with some of his most iconic tracks.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix' Death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away 56 years ago, leaving behind a legacy of innovative and influential music.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Remembered
angles.copy: It's been 56 years since Jimi Hendrix passed away, we're looking back at his incredible career and impact on music.

events.title: The Beatles Release Abbey Road 57 Years Ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago, featuring some of their most beloved tracks.

angles.name: The Beatles Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago, we're celebrating with some of the album's most iconic tracks and behind-the-scenes stories.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the iconic frontwoman for The Pretenders, is celebrating her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Chrissie Hynde turns 75 today, we're celebrating her incredible career with The Pretenders and her iconic voice.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the iconic frontman for Oasis, is celebrating his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Liam Gallagher turns 54 today, we're celebrating his incredible career with Oasis and his iconic voice.

events.title: John Lennon Released Imagine 51 Years Ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic album 'Imagine' 51 years ago, featuring the title track and 'Jealous Guy'.

angles.name: John Lennon Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: John Lennon released 'Imagine' 51 years ago, we're celebrating with some of the album's most iconic tracks and behind-the-scenes stories.

events.title: Apple Released the First iPod 25 Years Ago
events.blurb: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago, revolutionizing the way we listen to music on-the-go.

angles.name: Apple iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago, changing the music industry forever with its innovative design and functionality.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: It's James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic spy and his enduring impact on popular culture.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day, we're celebrating with some of the most iconic Bond themes and behind-the-scenes stories from the franchise.
